posts.text:
🚨BREAKING: Not even a week into office and Chile’s president has already begun building their border trenches to deter illegal migration.

President Trump has made a WORLDWIDE impact!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: These United States supposed "allies" just PROVED themselves to be freeloaders and proved President Trump right.

We shouldn't be supporting these countries if they're not going to support us.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Viewership for the Oscars PLUMMETED 9% with just 17.9 million viewers, making it the lowest viewed Oscars since 2022.

Meanwhile, @NICKIMINAJ just surpassed 800 MILLION STREAMS on Spotify in 2026.

32.6 million watched President Trump's SOTU.

Follow: @BoLoudon

🚨BREAKING: Tom Homan just called out Democrats for only being anti-ICE because the Democrat voter base of ILLEGAL ALIENS is being deported.

"We're ruining their long-term plans for power for decades to come!"

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: A Senate Democrat just said the QUIET PART OUT LOUD as to why they oppose the SAVE America Act:

"This bill is about stopping groups from voting who tend to vote for Democrats!"

Illegal aliens can't be voting...

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump is continuing to apply pressure to Senate Republicans to VOTE to PASS the SAVE America Act.

"The biggest thing coming up is a SAVE America Act in the Senate!"

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Republican Sen. Barrasso just SLAMMED any Republican and Democrat Senators refusing to vote for the SAVE America Act.

"We're going to put ALL of them on the record."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump's White House just agreed to some reasonable Democrat terms in exchange for them voting to re-open DHS.

If Democrats don't agree to this, they're absolutely insane.

No one works harder than TRUMP!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: The U.S. Senate just voted 51-48 to MOVE FORWARD with the common sense, much-needed SAVE America Act.

Senate Republicans, Don't give up until it's FULLY PASSED!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Even Mitch McConnell and Susan Collins just VOTED YES on the SAVE America Act.

Every Republican Senator should be a YES VOTE on this!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Senate Leader John Thune is refusing to cancel the Senate's SAVE America Act vote today to put Senators ON THE RECORD!

"I think having the fight, having the debate on the floor of the Senate is important."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: For the first time in 11 years, California's major oil pipeline just BEGAN FLOWING OIL AGAIN thanks to President Trump.

Thank you, Mr. Best President!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: The Irish people are DONE with mass migration and just peacefully took to the streets chanting "GET THEM OUT!"
 
@TheNotoriousMMA was right.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: A new President Trump rule just took effect and is now TERMINATING the commercial licenses of about 200,000 foreign truck drivers, per NYT.

These drivers must be able to speak English.

This is what I voted for!

Follow: @BoLoudon

🚨BREAKING: @HeyTammyBruce just praised President Trump as "exactly the right man at the right time!"

"I trust him. It's easy to do with President Trump. He's transparent, he's clear, and he gets the job done."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: An investigation was just LAUNCHED into Gavin Newsom's California after a video went viral of people being paid to sign petitions in the names of other voters.

I'm not surprised at all.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Republican Sen. Mike Lee says he's "ALL FOR" Republicans TAKING OVER the Senate floor TOMORROW to force Democrats to publicly say why they're against Voter ID.

God bless @BasedMikeLee!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: @NickShirleyy just EXPOSED a $170-MILLION-DOLLAR fraud operation taking place in Gavin Newsom's California.

All fraudsters need ARRESTED!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just UNLEASHED on supposed allies of the U.S. refusing to help the U.S. secure the Strait of Hormuz.

"...For 40 years we're protecting you and you don't want to get involved in something that is very minor?"

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just said Ilhan Omar, Tim Walz, and Keith Ellison are "COMPLICIT" in the Minnesota fraud.

God bless Trump for working to expose these CRIMINALS!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video
